---
title: "Supplement: Comparison of nowcasting methods during the 2024-2025 respiratory virus season in Massachusetts"
authors: "To be updated"
format: docx
editor: visual
bibliography: ref.bib
csl: vancouver.csl
output:
  bookdown::docx:
    fig_caption: yes
---

## Additional figures

### Training volume optimisation results

![Fig. SX Bar chart of overall weighted interval score (WIS) across all nowcast dates for all age groups (combined) for each model specification for the 2023-2024 season. Shading indicates underprediction, overprediction, and dispersion. X-axis labels indicate the model specification ranging from 1.5 to 4.5x the maximum delay for total training volume and 1/3 to 2/3 of the training volume used for delay estimation. Lower scores are better](../output/figs/supp/bar_chart_training_volume_opt.png)

![Fig. SX Heatmap of overall weighted interval score (WIS) across all nowcast dates for all age groups (combined) for each model specification for the 2023-2024 season. The x-axis indicates the proportion of the training volume used for delay estimation, the y-axis indicates the total training volume as a factor of the maximum delay, and the shading indicates the relative WIS compared to the minimum WIS across all specifications, with the minimum WIS representing the optimal training volume specification.](../output/figs/supp/heatmap_training_volume.png)

![Fig. SX Bar chart of overall weighted interval score (WIS) across all nowcast dates for all age groups (combined) for each model specification for the 2024-2025 season. Shading indicates underprediction, overprediction, and dispersion. X-axis labels indicate the model specification ranging from 1.5 to 4.5x the maximum delay for total training volume and 1/3 to 2/3 of the training volume used for delay estimation. Lower scores are better](../output/figs/supp/bar_chart_training_volume_opt_latest.png)

![Fig. SX Heatmap of overall weighted interval score (WIS) across all nowcast dates for all age groups (combined) for each model specification for the 2024-2025 season. The x-axis indicates the proportion of the training volume used for delay estimation, the y-axis indicates the total training volume as a factor of the maximum delay, and the shading indicates the relative WIS compared to the minimum WIS across all specifications, with the minimum WIS representing the optimal training volume specification.](../output/figs/supp/heatmap_training_volume_latest.png)

### Additional scoring results for state-level nowcasts

![Fig. SX Weighted interval score over time across all age groups (combined) throughout the 2024-2025 season, alongside epidemiological curve showing the total number of ED visits due to each pathogen over time. Color indicates model, each row is a different pathogen.](../output/figs/supp/state_wis_t.png)

![Fig. SX 95% interval coverage across all age groups (combined) for each model. Colors indicate model, horizontal dashed line indicates the nominal interval coverage, e.g. for a perfectly well-calibrated nowcasts we would expect 95% of the observations to fall within the 95% prediction interval.](../output/figs/supp/state_coverage.png)

![Fig. SX Zero-week horizon nowcasts for each model for Broad Acute Respiratory incidence for all age groups combined. Color indicates model, shading indicates WIS component.](../output/figs/supp/bar_horizon_0_00+.png)

![Fig. SX Zero-week horizon nowcasts for each model for COVID-19 for all age groups combined. Color indicates model, shading indicates WIS component.](../output/figs/supp/covid_horizon_0_00+.png)

![Fig. SX Zero-week horizon nowcasts for each model for influenza for all age groups combined. Color indicates model, shading indicates WIS component.](../output/figs/supp/flu_horizon_0_00+.png)

![Fig. SX Zero-week horizon nowcasts for each model for RSV for all age groups combined. Color indicates model, shading indicates WIS component.](../output/figs/supp/rsv_horizon_0_00+.png)

### Additional scoring results for age-group specific nowcasts

![Fig. SX Weighted interval score (WIS) for Broad Acute Respiratory Incidence for each age group. Color indicates model, shading indicates WIS component.](../output/figs/supp/bar_by_ag.png)

![Fig. SX Weighted interval score (WIS) for Influenza for each age group. Color indicates model, shading indicates WIS component.](../output/figs/supp/flu_by_ag.png)

![Fig. SX Weighted interval score (WIS) for COVID-19 for each age group. Color indicates model, shading indicates WIS component.](../output/figs/supp/covid_by_ag.png)

![Fig. SX Weighted interval score (WIS) for RSV for each age group. Color indicates model, shading indicates WIS component.](../output/figs/supp/rsv_by_ag.png)

#### Broad acute respiratory incidence 0-week horizon nowcasts

![Fig. SX Zero-week horizon nowcasts for each model for Broad Acute Respiratory incidence in the 00-04 age group. Color indicates model, shading indicates WIS component.](../output/figs/supp/bar_horizon_0_00_04.png)

![Fig. SX Zero-week horizon nowcasts for each model for Broad Acute Respiratory incidence in the 05-17 age group. Color indicates model, shading indicates WIS component.](../output/figs/supp/bar_horizon_0_05_17.png)

![Fig. SX Zero-week horizon nowcasts for each model for Broad Acute Respiratory incidence in the 18-44 age group. Color indicates model, shading indicates WIS component.](../output/figs/supp/bar_horizon_0_18_44.png)

![Fig. SX Zero-week horizon nowcasts for each model for Broad Acute Respiratory incidence in the 45-64 age group. Color indicates model, shading indicates WIS component.](../output/figs/supp/bar_horizon_0_45_64.png)

![Fig. SX Zero-week horizon nowcasts for each model for Broad Acute Respiratory incidence in the 65+ age group. Color indicates model, shading indicates WIS component.](../output/figs/supp/bar_horizon_0_65plus.png)

#### COVID-19 0-week horizon nowcasts

![Fig. SX Zero-week horizon nowcasts for each model for COVID-19 in the 00-04 age group. Color indicates model, shading indicates WIS component.](../output/figs/supp/covid_horizon_0_00_04.png)

![Fig. SX Zero-week horizon nowcasts for each model for COVID-19 in the 05-17 age group. Color indicates model, shading indicates WIS component.](../output/figs/supp/covid_horizon_0_05_17.png)

![Fig. SX Zero-week horizon nowcasts for each model for COVID-19 in the 18-44 age group. Color indicates model, shading indicates WIS component.](../output/figs/supp/covid_horizon_0_18_44.png)

![Fig. SX Zero-week horizon nowcasts for each model for COVID-19 in the 45-64 age group. Color indicates model, shading indicates WIS component.](../output/figs/supp/covid_horizon_0_45_64.png)

![Fig. SX Zero-week horizon nowcasts for each model for COVID-19 in the 65+ age group. Color indicates model, shading indicates WIS component.](../output/figs/supp/covid_horizon_0_65plus.png)

#### Influenza 0-week horizon nowcasts

![Fig. SX Zero-week horizon nowcasts for each model for influenza in the 00-04 age group. Color indicates model, shading indicates WIS component.](../output/figs/supp/flu_horizon_0_00_04.png)

![Fig. SX Zero-week horizon nowcasts for each model for influenza in the 05-17 age group. Color indicates model, shading indicates WIS component.](../output/figs/supp/flu_horizon_0_05_17.png)

![Fig. SX Zero-week horizon nowcasts for each model for influenza in the 18-44 age group. Color indicates model, shading indicates WIS component.](../output/figs/supp/flu_horizon_0_18_44.png)

![Fig. SX Zero-week horizon nowcasts for each model for influenza in the 45-64 age group. Color indicates model, shading indicates WIS component.](../output/figs/supp/flu_horizon_0_45_64.png)

![Fig. SX Zero-week horizon nowcasts for each model for influenza in the 65+ age group. Color indicates model, shading indicates WIS component.](../output/figs/supp/flu_horizon_0_65plus.png)

#### RSV 0-week horizon nowcasts

![Fig. SX Zero-week horizon nowcasts for each model for RSV in the 00-04 age group. Color indicates model, shading indicates WIS component.](../output/figs/supp/rsv_horizon_0_00_04.png)

![Fig. SX Zero-week horizon nowcasts for each model for RSV in the 05-17 age group. Color indicates model, shading indicates WIS component.](../output/figs/supp/rsv_horizon_0_05_17.png)

![Fig. SX Zero-week horizon nowcasts for each model for RSV in the 18-44 age group. Color indicates model, shading indicates WIS component.](../output/figs/supp/rsv_horizon_0_18_44.png)

![Fig. SX Zero-week horizon nowcasts for each model for RSV in the 45-64 age group. Color indicates model, shading indicates WIS component.](../output/figs/supp/rsv_horizon_0_45_64.png)

![Fig. SX Zero-week horizon nowcasts for each model for RSV in the 65+ age group. Color indicates model, shading indicates WIS component.](../output/figs/supp/rsv_horizon_0_65plus.png)
